batch_summary: In an apartment kitchen, Ross laments his recent divorce, fearing there is only one soulmate for everyone. Joey uses an ice cream metaphor to enthusiastically encourage Ross to embrace single life and start dating again, while Chandler offers sarcastic commentary. Meanwhile, Monica enjoys a flirtatious dinner date at an Asian restaurant with Paul, who hints at his own past heartbreak, leading the two to mutually anticipate a fifth date.

Monica playfully coaxes him, and the two share a flirtatious moment as they mutually agree that their connection is strong enough to warrant a fifth date.

batch_summary: During their date, Paul reveals to Monica that he has been unable to perform sexually since his wife left him two years ago. batch_summary: As Ross wonders who he will date, Rachel pensively contemplates her new life.
